info.name: TenantForm CRUD
info.description: CRUD endpoints for TenantForm (Property Management SaaS). Auth is cookie-based (better-auth.session_token + accessToken). Log in first via your auth request so Postman's cookie jar holds the session, then these requests will send cookies automatically.

body.raw:
{
  "tenantId": "{{tenantId}}",
